seo.title: Showroom Live Tracker - Real-time JKT48 Showroom Streams
seo.description: Track all active JKT48 Showroom live streams in real-time. Get member names, viewer counts, stream duration, room info, and live status — Showroom only, always accurate.

hero.heading: Who's live on Showroom right now?
hero.subheading: Track every active JKT48 Showroom live stream in real-time. Member info, viewer counts, stream duration, and room details — all from a single dedicated endpoint.

definition.title: What is the Showroom Live endpoint?
definition.text:
The Showroom Live endpoint returns a real-time snapshot of every active JKT48 member currently streaming on Showroom.

This endpoint is focused exclusively on Showroom — giving you a clean, dedicated response for when you only need Showroom data without mixing in IDN Live or YouTube streams.

Every active Showroom stream in the response includes:

- **Member info** — name, generation, and profile data linked to the stream
- **Viewer count** — current live viewer count on Showroom, updated in real-time
- **Stream duration** — how long the member has been streaming
- **Room URL** — direct link to the member's Showroom room
- **Room name** — the member's Showroom room name
- **Stream image** — live image URL from the Showroom broadcast

The endpoint only returns streams that are currently active. Once a stream ends, it is removed from the response immediately. Data is refreshed continuously so what you see always reflects what's actually live on Showroom right now.

This endpoint is ideal for apps and bots that specifically cover Showroom content and want a lightweight, focused response without data from other platforms.

capabilities_section.title: What you can do with Showroom Live
capabilities_section.intro: Build Showroom-focused features with clean, real-time stream data.

capabilities.title: Real-time Showroom feed
capabilities.description: Get a live-updating list of every JKT48 member currently streaming on Showroom. Stream starts and ends are reflected immediately — no stale data.

capabilities.title: Viewer count tracking
capabilities.description: Access current Showroom viewer counts for each active stream, updated in real-time. Build leaderboards, popularity trackers, and oshi support counters.

capabilities.title: Room info & stream image
capabilities.description: Each stream entry includes the member's Showroom room name, room URL, and a live stream image — everything you need to build a rich stream card without extra lookups.

capabilities.title: Member-linked stream data
capabilities.description: Every Showroom stream is linked to the corresponding JKT48Connect member record, giving you instant access to name, generation, photo, and profile without a separate lookup.

capabilities.title: Stream duration
capabilities.description: Know how long each member has been live on Showroom. Display elapsed time in your UI or use it to sort streams by duration for content discovery.

capabilities.title: Webhook notifications
capabilities.description: Receive a POST request the moment any JKT48 member goes live on Showroom or ends their stream. Build oshi alert bots without polling the API.

how_it_works.title: How the Showroom Live endpoint works
how_it_works.intro: One endpoint, one platform, always real-time.

steps.title: Call the Showroom Live endpoint
steps.description: Make a GET request to /v1/live/showroom with your API key. No extra configuration needed — the response always reflects the current state of Showroom.

steps.title: Receive normalized stream data
steps.description: Get a list of all active Showroom streams with consistent fields — member info, viewer count, duration, room name, room URL, and stream image.

steps.title: Filter by member or generation (optional)
steps.description: Pass query parameters to filter streams by member ID or generation. Useful for apps focused on a specific JKT48 team or generation.

steps.title: Display or trigger actions
steps.description: Render a live Showroom feed, send push notifications, update a Discord bot, or trigger any action based on who's live and their current viewer counts.

use_cases.title: Who uses the Showroom Live endpoint
use_cases.intro: Fan developers building Showroom-focused JKT48 experiences.

items.title: Showroom live dashboards
items.description: Display a real-time grid of all active JKT48 Showroom streams on your fansite. Show member photos, room names, viewer counts — updated automatically without page refresh.

items.title: Oshi Showroom notification bots
items.description: Build Discord or Telegram bots that ping fans the moment their oshi goes live on Showroom. Use webhooks for instant notifications without polling.

items.title: Showroom viewer leaderboards
items.description: Rank JKT48 members by current Showroom viewer count in real-time. Build oshi support trackers that update as streams grow or end.

items.title: Showroom stream directories
items.description: Build a filterable directory of all active JKT48 Showroom streams — sorted by viewer count, duration, or generation — for fans to discover who's on right now.

related_features.title: All Live
related_features.description: Need all platforms at once? All Live aggregates IDN Live, Showroom, and YouTube (JKT48V) into a single endpoint.

related_features.title: IDN Live
related_features.description: Track JKT48 streams on IDN Live with a dedicated endpoint, same structure as Showroom Live.

related_features.title: Member Profiles
related_features.description: Each Showroom stream is linked to a full member record. Access profiles, generations, and social links alongside stream data.

related_features.title: Event Notifications
related_features.description: Get notified for handshake events, off-air shows, and special appearances alongside Showroom live alerts.

faqs.title: Frequently asked questions
faqs.intro: Common questions about the Showroom Live endpoint.

items.question: Does this endpoint include IDN Live or YouTube streams?
items.answer: No. The Showroom Live endpoint returns only Showroom streams. If you need IDN Live or YouTube (JKT48V) streams as well, use the All Live endpoint which aggregates all three platforms into a single response.

items.question: How real-time is the viewer count data?
items.answer: Viewer counts are updated continuously. On Pro and Enterprise plans, data latency is under 10 seconds. On the free tier, data is refreshed every 30 seconds. Stream start and end events are detected within seconds across all plans.

items.question: What happens when a stream ends?
items.answer: Ended streams are removed from the Showroom Live response immediately. If you're using webhooks, you'll also receive a stream_end event so your app can update in real-time without polling.

items.question: Can I filter streams by member or generation?
items.answer: Yes. Pass a member_id or generation query parameter to filter the response. This is useful for apps focused on a specific JKT48 team or generation.

items.question: How do I get notified when a member goes live on Showroom?
items.answer: Use webhooks (available on Pro and Enterprise plans). Register a webhook URL and specify which members to watch. JKT48Connect will send a POST request to your endpoint within seconds of a stream starting on Showroom.

items.question: Are all JKT48 generations covered?
items.answer: Yes. The endpoint covers all active JKT48 members across all generations who are currently streaming on Showroom, with no generation filtering applied by default.
